transcript: Hi, this is David Okafor, date of birth July 9th, 1990. I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Lee. I'm pretty flexible, so I could come in next Tuesday morning, or if that's full, Thursday at 2 PM works too, and honestly anytime Friday afternoon would also be fine. My insurance is Blue Cross Blue Shield and my callback number is (415) 555-0188. Thanks.
